channel.title: diy on Jane - A super concise theme for Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in diy on Jane - A super concise theme for Hugo

item.title: To DIY or Not to DIY!
item.description: tldr; Choose a DIY project if you have nothing better to do or you just love it. If not stay away! We have many “hobbies” or things which we wish to get done. Our professional lives are boring! (Speak for yourself?) We seek joy in non-work things in our lives. Gardening 🪴, Building your own furniture 🪑, Building your own website 💻, Cooking 👨‍🍳, Cleaning 🧹, HBO 📺. . .
